attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SMFAT.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY 
,SMOFB.REMAINING_LIFE1 AS REMAINING_LIFE_MONTHS_CNT
,cast( SMOFB.COST as decimal(26,7) )  AS CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
,cast( ( cast (SMOFB.COST as decimal(26,7) ) *  NCCDR1.PL_CONVERSION_RATE)  as decimal(26,7)  ) AS CURRENT_COST_USD_AMT 
,cast (0 as decimal(26,7) ) as NET_DEPRECIATION_AMT 
,SMOFB.DATE_INEFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_BOOK_INEFFECTIVE_DTM
,SMOFB.DATE_EFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_BOOK_EFFECTIVE_DTM
,cast(SMOFB.ORIGINAL_COST  as decimal(26,7) )  AS  ORIGINAL_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,cast ( (  cast(SMOFB.ORIGINAL_COST as decimal(26,7) ) * NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE ) as decimal(26,7) )   AS   ORIGINAL_COST_USD_AMT   
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
,SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN AS SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
,SMOFB.DV_DEPRN_START_DATE AS ASSET_DEPRECIATION_START_DT
,SMOFB.DV_DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE AS  ASSET_PLACED_IN_SERVICE_DT
,SMOFB.DEPRN_METHOD_CODE AS DEPRECIATION_METHOD_CD
,SMOFB.LIFE_IN_MONTHS  AS ASST_DEPRECIABLE_LIFE_MTHS_CNT
,SMOFB.DV_CONVERSION_DATE AS ASSET_ACQUISITION_DT
,EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER AS BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
,NGLAAK.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS  BK_COMPANY_CD
,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,SMOFB.ACTION_CODE
,'=' AS DML_TYPE

FROM 
(
	SELECT
			BATCH_ID,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			ACTION_CODE,
			ASSET_ID,
			GLOBAL_NAME,
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			LIFE_IN_MONTHS,
			ORIGINAL_COST,
			COST,
			REMAINING_LIFE1,
			TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,
			CAST(DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE AS DATE) AS  DV_DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE,
			CAST(DEPRN_START_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_DEPRN_START_DATE ,
			CAST(CONVERSION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CONVERSION_DATE,
			DEPRN_METHOD_CODE,
			CREATE_DATETIME,
			DATE_EFFECTIVE,
			CAST(DATE_EFFECTIVE AS DATE) AS DV_DATE_EFFECTIVE,
			GES_UPDATE_DATE,
			LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
			CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATE_DATE 		,
			DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_BOOKS
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
			BATCH_ID,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			ACTION_CODE,
			ASSET_ID,
			GLOBAL_NAME,
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			LIFE_IN_MONTHS,
			ORIGINAL_COST,
			COST,
			REMAINING_LIFE1,
			TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,
			CAST(DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE AS DATE) AS  DV_DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE,
			CAST(DEPRN_START_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_DEPRN_START_DATE ,
			CAST(CONVERSION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_CONVERSION_DATE,
			DEPRN_METHOD_CODE,
			CREATE_DATETIME,
			DATE_EFFECTIVE,
			CAST(DATE_EFFECTIVE AS DATE) AS DV_DATE_EFFECTIVE,
			GES_UPDATE_DATE,
			LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
			CAST(LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATE_DATE 		,
			DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_BOOKS_TRX  
) SMOFB  
 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB 
                                ON (EFAB.ASSET_ID=SMOFB.ASSET_ID AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME=SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME  ) 
 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC
                                ON (SMOFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
                                                AND SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME
                                                AND BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
                                                )
                                                 
 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_CATEGORY_BOOKS  EFACB        
                                ON (SMOFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = EFACB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
                                                AND  EFAB.ASSET_CATEGORY_ID = EFACB.CATEGORY_ID
                                                AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME = EFACB.GLOBAL_NAME  )
 
INNER JOIN        $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME
 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_BOOK_TYPE NFAB
                ON(NFAB.BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD  = EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
                                                and FA_BOOK_CLASS_CD= 'CORPORATE')
                
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON (EFABC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT 
                                                AND   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE)
        
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLAAK
ON(EFACB.ASSET_COST_ACCOUNT_CCID = NGLAAK.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT 
                AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLAAK.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY) 
 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
                ON ( NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE =NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  
                                AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'  AND
                                                NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=SMOFB.DV_DATE_EFFECTIVE )  
 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR1 
                ON ( NCCDR1.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
                                AND NCCDR1.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD' 
                                                AND       NCCDR1.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=SMOFB.DV_LAST_UPDATE_DATE )
 INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION SMFAT 
	  ON ( SMFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT = SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN
	  AND SMFAT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 


INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
ON (NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER
AND NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD = NGLAAK.BK_COMPANY_CODE )

SELECT 
SMOFB.BATCH_ID 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_CAPACITY 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_COST 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_RATE 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTED_RECOVERABLE_COST 
,SMOFB.ADJUSTMENT_REQUIRED_STATUS 
,SMOFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT 
,SMOFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT_AMOUNT 
,SMOFB.ANNUAL_DEPRN_ROUNDING_FLAG 
,SMOFB.ANNUAL_ROUNDING_FLAG 
,SMOFB.ASSET_ID 
,SMOFB.BASIC_RATE 
,SMOFB.BONUS_RULE 
,SMOFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
,SMOFB.CAPITALIZE_FLAG 
,SMOFB.CEILING_NAME 
,SMOFB.CONVERSION_DATE 
,SMOFB.COST 
,SMOFB.COST_CHANGE_FLAG 
,SMOFB.DATE_EFFECTIVE 
,SMOFB.DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
,SMOFB.DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE 
,SMOFB.DEPRECIATE_FLAG 
,SMOFB.DEPRN_METHOD_CODE 
,SMOFB.DEPRN_START_DATE 
,SMOFB.EOFY_ADJ_COST 
,SMOFB.EOFY_FORMULA_FACTOR 
,SMOFB.FORMULA_FACTOR 
,SMOFB.FULLY_RSVD_REVALS_COUNTER 
,SMOFB.GES_UPDATE_DATE 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4 
,SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME 
,SMOFB.GROUP_ASSET_ID 
,SMOFB.IDLED_FLAG 
,SMOFB.ITC_AMOUNT 
,SMOFB.ITC_AMOUNT_ID 
,SMOFB.ITC_BASIS 
,SMOFB.LAST_UPDATED_BY 
,SMOFB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
,SMOFB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
,SMOFB.LIFE_IN_MONTHS 
,SMOFB.OLD_ADJUSTED_COST 
,SMOFB.ORIGINAL_COST 
,SMOFB.ORIGINAL_DEPRN_START_DATE 
,SMOFB.PERCENT_SALVAGE_VALUE 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_CAPITALIZED 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RESERVED 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RETIRED 
,SMOFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_LIFE_COMPLETE 
,SMOFB.PRODUCTION_CAPACITY 
,SMOFB.PRORATE_CONVENTION_CODE 
,SMOFB.PRORATE_DATE 
,SMOFB.RATE_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR 
,SMOFB.RECOVERABLE_COST 
,SMOFB.REMAINING_LIFE1 
,SMOFB.REMAINING_LIFE2 
,SMOFB.RETIREMENT_ID 
,SMOFB.RETIREMENT_PENDING_FLAG 
,SMOFB.REVAL_AMORTIZATION_BASIS 
,SMOFB.REVAL_CEILING 
,SMOFB.SALVAGE_VALUE 
,SMOFB.SHORT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG 
,SMOFB.TAX_REQUEST_ID 
,SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN 
,SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_OUT 
,SMOFB.UNIT_OF_MEASURE 
,SMOFB.UNREVALUED_COST 
,SMOFB.CREATE_DATETIME 
,SMOFB.ACTION_CODE
FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
		SMFB.BATCH_ID 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_CAPACITY 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_COST 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_RATE 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTED_RECOVERABLE_COST 
		,SMFB.ADJUSTMENT_REQUIRED_STATUS 
		,SMFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT 
		,SMFB.ALLOWED_DEPRN_LIMIT_AMOUNT 
		,SMFB.ANNUAL_DEPRN_ROUNDING_FLAG 
		,SMFB.ANNUAL_ROUNDING_FLAG 
		,SMFB.ASSET_ID 
		,SMFB.BASIC_RATE 
		,SMFB.BONUS_RULE 
		,SMFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
		,SMFB.CAPITALIZE_FLAG 
		,SMFB.CEILING_NAME 
		,SMFB.CONVERSION_DATE 
		,SMFB.COST 
		,SMFB.COST_CHANGE_FLAG 
		,SMFB.DATE_EFFECTIVE 
		,SMFB.DATE_INEFFECTIVE 
		,SMFB.DATE_PLACED_IN_SERVICE 
		,SMFB.DEPRECIATE_FLAG 
		,SMFB.DEPRN_METHOD_CODE 
		,SMFB.DEPRN_START_DATE 
		,SMFB.EOFY_ADJ_COST 
		,SMFB.EOFY_FORMULA_FACTOR 
		,SMFB.FORMULA_FACTOR 
		,SMFB.FULLY_RSVD_REVALS_COUNTER 
		,SMFB.GES_UPDATE_DATE 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4 
		,SMFB.GLOBAL_NAME 
		,SMFB.GROUP_ASSET_ID 
		,SMFB.IDLED_FLAG 
		,SMFB.ITC_AMOUNT 
		,SMFB.ITC_AMOUNT_ID 
		,SMFB.ITC_BASIS 
		,SMFB.LAST_UPDATED_BY 
		,SMFB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
		,SMFB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN 
		,SMFB.LIFE_IN_MONTHS 
		,SMFB.OLD_ADJUSTED_COST 
		,SMFB.ORIGINAL_COST 
		,SMFB.ORIGINAL_DEPRN_START_DATE 
		,SMFB.PERCENT_SALVAGE_VALUE 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_CAPITALIZED 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RESERVED 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_FULLY_RETIRED 
		,SMFB.PERIOD_COUNTER_LIFE_COMPLETE 
		,SMFB.PRODUCTION_CAPACITY 
		,SMFB.PRORATE_CONVENTION_CODE 
		,SMFB.PRORATE_DATE 
		,SMFB.RATE_ADJUSTMENT_FACTOR 
		,SMFB.RECOVERABLE_COST 
		,SMFB.REMAINING_LIFE1 
		,SMFB.REMAINING_LIFE2 
		,SMFB.RETIREMENT_ID 
		,SMFB.RETIREMENT_PENDING_FLAG 
		,SMFB.REVAL_AMORTIZATION_BASIS 
		,SMFB.REVAL_CEILING 
		,SMFB.SALVAGE_VALUE 
		,SMFB.SHORT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG 
		,SMFB.TAX_REQUEST_ID 
		,SMFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN 
		,SMFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_OUT 
		,SMFB.UNIT_OF_MEASURE 
		,SMFB.UNREVALUED_COST 
		,SMFB.CREATE_DATETIME 
		,SMFB.ACTION_CODE
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_BOOKS SMFB 
	) SMOFB 
		INNER JOIN 	$$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC
			ON (SMOFB.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
				AND SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME
				AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
				) 
	WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	( select 1 from $$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_BOOK  WFATB,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	    WHERE WFATB.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	    and SMOFB.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN= WFATB.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
	    and  SMOFB.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	)

SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,SMOFTH.SS_CODE) + MAX_VAL FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY,
      		 SMOFTH.SS_CODE,SMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN 
  FROM ( 
		  SELECT STMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CODE
		  FROM
		 	   $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_BOOKS STMOFTH
		  INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC  
	           ON (STMOFTH.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
	           AND STMOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME  
	           AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
	           )    
		  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	       	  ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOFTH.GLOBAL_NAME
     	)SMOFTH,
       ( SELECT COALESCE (MAX (FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION 
       ) SFTHMAX
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION SMFAT
           WHERE SMOFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN = SMFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
             AND SMOFTH.SS_CODE = SMFAT.SS_CD)
